Personal.content:
# The Best Karan Aujla Quotes

Here is a collection of some of the hardest-hitting lines from Karan Aujla, broken down by theme.

### On Hustle & The Come Up
* **"Mera pehla pehla kandeya ne pair vaddta. Mera time aaya kalla kalla kanda kaddta."** 
  * *Meaning:* At first, the thorns injured my feet. When my time came, I overcame every single obstacle.
* **"Eh taan lokan nu hi chaleya ni luck lageya. Mera kinni vaari dharti naal nakk lageya."**
  * *Meaning:* These people think that I've just gotten lucky, but I've been pushed down to the ground many times.

### On Mindset & Principles
* **"Assi pitth te ni hikk utte vaar kari da."**
  * *Meaning:* We don't backstab, we attack straight at your chest.
* **"Jithe mildi ni mat behas karda ni yaar."**
  * *Meaning:* Where my moral standards aren't met, I don't even engage in discussion.

### On Confidence & Flexing
* **"Kalle da hi rohb aa bathera goriye."**
  * *Meaning:* I am confident and carry enough presence all by myself.
* **"Jehde fukkre ne muhron ohna de layi fukkri."**
  * *Meaning:* I embarrass people who try to show off to me.

### On God & Staying Grounded
* **"Kade socheya ni kinna utte chakke patshah. Khush rehne aa ni jithe saanu rakhe patshah."**
  * *Meaning:* I never thought God would bring me so much success. I am content with wherever God keeps me.
